steps.title: Identify intersection point
steps.content:
The solution to a system of linear equations is the point where the two lines intersect. Locate this point directly on the graph. The lines cross at a point with coordinates corresponding to a choice.
  • Look for the point that both lines clearly share.

steps.title: Match coordinates to the grid
steps.content:
Read the x- and y-values at the intersection.
  • The x-coordinate is 2.
  • The y-coordinate is 4.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
